name: Aloo Paratha
steps: Boil and mash potatoes.
Add chopped onions and spices.
Stuff mixture into dough and roll.
Cook on tawa with ghee until golden brown.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
steps: Cook tomato puree with spices.
Add cream and butter.
Add paneer cubes and simmer.
Serve with naan or rice.

name: Masala Dosa
steps: Make dosa batter and ferment overnight.
Prepare spiced potato filling.
Spread batter on tawa, cook and fill with masala.
Serve with chutney and sambar.

name: Bread Pakora
steps: Make potato filling with spices.
Sandwich between bread slices.
Dip in gram flour batter and deep fry.
Serve hot with chutney.

name: Poha
steps: Wash and drain poha.
Sauté mustard, onions, chili in oil.
Add poha and cook for 2–3 mins.
Finish with lemon juice and coriander.

name: Chole Bhature
steps: Soak and cook chickpeas with spices.
Make dough with flour and yogurt.
Roll and deep fry bhature.
Serve chole with bhature and onion slices.

name: Dal Tadka
steps: Cook lentils until soft.
Prepare tadka with onion, tomato, garlic, and spices.
Mix tadka with cooked lentils.
Serve with rice or roti.

name: Vegetable Biryani
steps: Cook rice with spices and saffron.
Sauté mixed vegetables with spices.
Layer rice and vegetables, cook on low heat.
Serve hot with raita.

name: Gulab Jamun
steps: Make dough with milk powder, flour, and ghee.
Shape into balls and fry until golden.
Soak in sugar syrup flavored with cardamom.
Serve warm or at room temperature.

name: Paneer Tikka
steps: Marinate paneer and vegetables in yogurt and spices.
Skewer and grill until charred.
Serve with mint chutney.

name: Rajma
steps: Soak and cook kidney beans with spices.
Prepare gravy with tomatoes and onions.
Mix beans with gravy and simmer.
Serve with steamed rice.

name: Pani Puri
steps: Make puris from semolina dough and fry until crisp.
Prepare filling with chickpeas and potatoes.
Serve with spicy pani and chutney.

name: Samosa
steps: Make dough with flour and water.
Prepare filling with mashed potatoes and peas.
Shape and fill dough, then deep fry.
Serve hot with chutney.

name: Kheer
steps: Boil rice in milk until soft.
Add sugar and cardamom.
Garnish with nuts and serve chilled.

name: Biryani
steps: Marinate meat or vegetables with yogurt and spices.
Cook rice with saffron and spices.
Layer rice and meat/vegetables, cook on low heat.
Serve with raita.

name: Dhokla
steps: Make batter with gram flour and yogurt.
Steam until cooked.
Temper with mustard seeds, chili, and curry leaves.
Serve with green chutney.

name: Pav Bhaji
steps: Boil and mash mixed vegetables.
Cook with spices and butter.
Serve with buttered pav and chopped onions.

name: Aloo Gobi
steps: Sauté onions and tomatoes with spices.
Add potato and cauliflower, cook until tender.
Serve with roti or rice.

name: Vada Pav
steps: Make spiced potato filling.
Shape into patties and fry.
Serve in bread with chutney and chili.

name: Pulao
steps: Sauté spices, cashews, and raisins.
Add mixed vegetables and rice.
Cook until rice is fluffy.
Serve with raita.

name: Kadhi Pakora
steps: Make batter with gram flour and spices.
Fry pakoras until golden.
Cook yogurt with spices to make kadhi.
Add pakoras to kadhi and simmer.

name: Bhindi Masala
steps: Sauté onions and tomatoes with spices.
Add chopped okra and cook until tender.
Garnish with coriander and serve.

name: Methi Thepla
steps: Make dough with fenugreek leaves, flour, and spices.
Roll into thin flatbreads.
Cook on tawa with oil until golden.
Serve with yogurt or pickle.

name: Pesarattu
steps: Soak green gram and rice overnight.
Blend with ginger and chili to make batter.
Cook on tawa until crisp.
Serve with chutney.

name: Butter Chicken
steps: Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices.
Cook tomato puree with butter and cream.
Add marinated chicken and simmer until cooked.
Serve with naan or rice.

name: Tandoori Chicken
steps: Marinate chicken in yogurt, spices, and lemon juice.
Skewer and grill until charred.
Garnish with cilantro and serve with mint chutney.

name: Chicken 65
steps: Marinate chicken with yogurt and spices.
Fry until crispy.
Temper with curry leaves and green chili.
Serve hot as a snack or appetizer.

name: Fish Curry
steps: Sauté onions and tomatoes with spices.
Add fish pieces and cook until tender.
Pour in coconut milk and simmer.
Serve with steamed rice.

name: Egg Curry
steps: Boil eggs and peel.
Sauté onions and tomatoes with spices.
Add boiled eggs and simmer.
Garnish with coriander and serve.

name: Palak Paneer
steps: Blanch spinach and blend to a puree.
Sauté onions and tomatoes with spices.
Add paneer cubes and spinach puree, cook until thick.
Serve with roti or rice.

name: Baingan Bharta
steps: Roast eggplant until charred, peel and mash.
Sauté onions and tomatoes with spices.
Add mashed eggplant and cook until well combined.
Garnish with cilantro and serve.

name: Mutton Rogan Josh
steps: Marinate mutton with yogurt and spices.
Sauté onions and ginger, add marinated mutton.
Cook until tender and gravy thickens.
Serve with naan or rice.

name: Chicken Biryani
steps: Marinate chicken with yogurt and spices.
Cook rice with saffron and spices.
Layer rice and chicken, cook on low heat.
Serve with raita.

name: Vegetable Manchurian
steps: Make small balls from mixed vegetables and cornflour.
Fry until golden brown.
Prepare sauce with soy sauce, ginger, and garlic.
Add fried balls to sauce and serve hot.

name: Prawn Curry
steps: Sauté onions and tomatoes with spices.
Add prawns and cook until pink.
Pour in coconut milk and simmer.
Serve with steamed rice.

name: Dal Makhani
steps: Soak and cook black lentils and kidney beans.
Prepare gravy with cream, butter, and spices.
Mix cooked lentils and beans with gravy.
Serve with naan or rice.

name: Roti
steps: Make dough with wheat flour, water, and salt.
Divide into small balls and roll into flatbreads.
Cook on tawa until puffed and golden.
Serve hot with curries.

name: Naan
steps: Make dough with all-purpose flour, yeast, yogurt, water, and salt.
Let it rise until doubled in size.
Roll into flatbreads and cook in tandoor or oven.
Serve with butter or garlic topping.

name: Paneer Tikka
steps: Marinate paneer and vegetables in yogurt and spices.
Skewer and grill until charred.
Serve with mint chutney.

name: Chole
steps: Soak and cook chickpeas until tender.
Sauté onions, tomatoes, and spices.
Mix cooked chickpeas with gravy and simmer.
Serve with bhature or rice.
